definitions: An acronym for High-Level Language, referring to a programming language with strong abstraction from the details of the computer's operation.
An acronym for Hindustan Lever Limited, a former name of an Indian consumer goods company, now known as Hindustan Unilever Limited.
examples: Many modern applications are written in an HLL.
The programmer preferred to code in an HLL.
HLL was a major player in the Indian market.
The company changed its name from HLL.
